theme: Case study: How a pharma company turned 80 employees into brand ambassadors

linkedin.text:
"We spent ₪220,000. We retained talent worth 10x that." That's a CEO's exact words after one trip.

The brief: 80 pharma field reps coming off a record quarter, and a CEO who wanted more than plaques. The challenge: these people had seen every classic incentive and were hard to impress.

What we built — Budapest, 4 nights:
→ Thermal spa evening at Széchenyi baths. Champagne, live music, nobody on their phone.
→ Private dinner inside the Hungarian Parliament, with a river view they'll describe for a decade.
→ A city scavenger hunt with a secret mission — inside jokes still circulating in their WhatsApp groups.
→ Awards ceremony on a Danube cruise, with a personal 60-second tribute for each recipient.

The results:
• Sales-team NPS up 18 points
• Zero resignations among participants for 14 months
• 3 people told HR they turned down competitor offers because of the trip

That's not event production. It's strategic investment — the kind we've delivered across 200+ events since 2010.

📅 Book a free 30-minute planning call to design yours.
